items.claim: Sam Patterson is a sharp kickboxer from the outside with fast hands and clean straight shots.
items.quote: He's a sharp kickboxer from the outside. He's got fast hands. He's clean with his straight shots.

items.claim: Sam Patterson has good power in his punches despite his wiry, skinny build.
items.quote: He hits hard, especially for that skinny build. He's got that wiry skinny build. You know, there's some power in his punches.

items.claim: Sam Patterson has a good ground game.
items.quote: And his ground game's good, too.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzinibio is looking slow and is one and three in his last four fights.
items.quote: Ponzi who's looking slow. I don't want to hate on Ponzi too because, you know, leads the commentary for the Spanish broadcast. He's grizzled OG of the fight game, but he's one and three in his last four.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzinibio was knocked out badly by D-Rod a year and two months ago and has not fought since.
items.quote: He got knocked out badly in his last fight. It was a year and two months ago against D-Rod. Has not fought in a year and two months.

items.claim: Santiago Ponzinibio is nearly 40 years old.
Sam Patterson has a five-inch reach advantage, a three-inch height advantage, and is nine years younger than Ponzinibio.
items.quote: Five inch reach advantage, three-inch height advantage, nine years younger.
